summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Afroboost Access CRUD and Payment Transaction features. All 27 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend Admin panel correctly displays 'Gestion Complète des Accès' and 'Historique des Paiements' sections with full CRUD functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: All Access CRUD endpoints working correctly: GET /api/access, POST /api/access, PUT /api/access/{id}, DELETE /api/access/{id}
Revocation endpoint POST /api/access/{id}/revoke correctly validates only active access can be revoked
Payment initiation validates enabled payment methods per level configuration
Webhook endpoint correctly creates UserAccess automatically after payment completion
Backward compatibility maintained - access changes update user_level_progress.access_granted
seed_data_creation: Created test access records for ui-test-user-001 (Level 1), test-complete-access (Level 1). Payment transactions created for TEST_user_* users with Stripe, TWINT, MTN Mobile Money methods.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Access CRUD and Payment Transaction APIs fully tested. AdminAccessComplete.js and AdminPaymentHistory.js components working correctly. Payment flow: initiate -> webhook -> access created automatically. Multi-region payment methods supported: Stripe (EU), TWINT (CH), Mobile Money MTN/Orange/Airtel (Africa), Paystack/Flutterwave aggregators.

backend_apis: GET /api/access - List all access with filters (user_id, level_id, status)
GET /api/payments/history - Payment transaction history with filters
POST /api/payments/initiate - Initiate payment (Stripe, TWINT, Mobile Money)
frontend_components: AdminAccessComplete.js - Access management with stats, filters, table, CRUD dialogs
AdminPaymentHistory.js - Payment history with stats, filters, transaction table
Create Access Dialog - User ID, Level, Type, Status, Expiration fields
Edit Access Dialog - Status, Type, Expiration modification
Revoke Access Dialog - Reason input, confirmation
